entries.change: Wire CT storeDetail() + updateShortMemory() in columnTraceState.ts
entries.detail: ct-q1: FAIL→PASS (sources 1/4→4/4, chain 7→18, DQ 82→93%). ct-q2: PARTIAL→PASS (sources 2/4→4/4+1, chain 18→21, DQ 74→93%). Validated with Haiku on 2026-04-09 (run-2026-04-09T08-20). Zero rejections, zero errors. Memory wiring keeps column rename context visible across deep traces via sliding window summaries.

entries.change: Export detail_slots + short_memory in CT getResult() via getMemoryForSynthesis()
entries.detail: CT getResult() now includes detail_slots and short_memory, matching BB pattern. Bridge-validated: CustomerSegment trace returned 3 detail slots + 3 narrative entries. AI can now reference stored findings at synthesis time for enrich_view sections.

entries.change: Full 14-test regression eval for R1+R3 (CT memory wiring + result export)
entries.detail: 10/14→12/14 PASS. Zero regressions. ct-q2: PARTIAL→PASS (4/4+ sources, 10 renames). ct-q1: FAIL→PARTIAL (3/4 sources — Haiku variance pruned MarkupRules). bb-q5: FAIL→FAIL improved (3/12→6/12 nodes). New baseline locked.

entries.change: CT over-trace fix: pass-as-focus + unified working memory + value-vs-selection prompt
entries.detail: Root cause: applyPass() called advanceFrontier() pushing ALL children blindly. Fix: pass nodes queued as lightweight focus hops — AI sees neighbors and verdicts individually. Also: buildBaseWorkingMemory() in smBase.ts (OOP), short memory captures pass nodes, value-vs-selection prompt framework. ct-q3b: 14→7 nodes, 12→4 hops. ct-q4: no regression (8 hops, all sources). Haiku eval confirms.
lessons: Prompt changes alone don't fix structural SM issues — check if AI has the right levers
pass auto-expand was the root cause, not prompting — AI had no control over scope growth
OOP: shared capabilities (working memory, progress metadata) belong in base class
Short memory must capture ALL visited nodes (trace + pass), not just chain entries
Test with DIFFERENT questions per iteration to avoid overfitting
entries.next: Full regression eval on all 24 tests, then manual UAT in VS Code

entries.change: Bridge sync fix: CT submit_hop_analysis missing badge_label/note_caption + BB verdict 'pass' rejected
entries.detail: Bridge dispatcher.ts was out of sync with extension.ts after commit 0b0629f. Two issues: (1) CT submit_hop_analysis didn't pass badge_label/note_caption to submitVerdicts() — detail slots had no semantic labels, suggested_sections empty. (2) BB submit_findings validation rejected 'pass' verdict (only accepted 'noted') — unified classification uses 'pass'. Also: eval-suite.yaml updated to remove CustomerMaster from ct-q3/ct-q3b chain_path (value-vs-selection correctly prunes it — all CASE branches produce string literals).
lessons: Bridge dispatcher must be updated alongside extension.ts for every tool parameter change
BB verdict validation must accept 'pass' (unified classification), not just legacy 'noted'
Eval definitions must reflect current framework — stale expected paths cause false FAILs
Haiku has high variance on value-vs-selection: same SM+prompts, auto=4 nodes vs Haiku=15 nodes
entries.next: Re-run Haiku eval after bridge sync fix, await more live UAT results
